---
title: "DiffBind"
author: "Cèsar-Lluís"
date: "14/9/2022"
output: html_document
---

#Set working directory
```{r setup}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath('/Users/csierra/mount/point2/CRG/ATAC_N'))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
setwd(knitr::opts_knit$get("root.dir"))
getwd()
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(DESeq2)
library(edgeR)
library(DiffBind)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

#MinOverlap=2
#Load raw counts
```{r}
data_count <- readRDS("diffbind_data_count.rds")
```

#Normalize
```{r}
data_norm <- dba.normalize(data_count_all, library=DBA_LIBSIZE_PEAKREADS)
```

#Contrasts
```{r}
da_all <- dba.contrast(data_norm, categories=DBA_CONDITION, minMembers = 2)
da_all <- dba.analyze(da_all, method=DBA_ALL_METHODS, bGreylist=FALSE)
saveRDS(da_all, "/Users/CSIERRA/OneDrive - CRG - Centre de Regulacio Genomica/Results/FANS/DNA/P_diffbind_macs2_q005_filt/CSN_diffbind_data_count_analysis_norm.rds")
```
